text:
No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
478 LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_ADMSN_CD LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has found little interest or pleasure in doing things. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
479 LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_DSCHRG_CD LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Little interest/pleasure
